issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes Node environment and Supabase CLI, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: RLS-secured profiles/projects schema with auto-profile trigger
scenarios.rationale: Baseline enables RLS only on projects and omits security definer on the trigger function; treatment enables RLS on both tables, writes the auth.uid()-based owner policies, and uses security definer plus the after-insert trigger on auth.users.

scenarios.name: Avatar upload storage bucket with folder-based RLS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uploads to a flat path and omits the storage.foldername RLS check, defeating the auth scoping; treatment creates the public avatars bucket, applies the auth.uid()::text = (storage.foldername(name))[1] insert policy, and uploads to ${user.id}/avatar.png.
